# Esthien Labs

Esthien Labs is the public identity of Esthien Pvt Ltd, a deep-tech semiconductor company building FPGA-first custom silicon for deterministic physical intelligence. The company focuses on FPGA-based edge AI, sensor fusion, bionic-arm control systems, prosthetics electronics, automotive radar, ADAS, and safety-critical embedded hardware.

## Canonical Site

- [Esthien Labs](https://www.esthien.com/)
- [About Esthien Labs](https://www.esthien.com/about)
- [Esthien Labs Vision](https://www.esthien.com/vision)
- [Esthien Labs Capabilities](https://www.esthien.com/capabilities)
- [Contact Esthien Labs](https://www.esthien.com/contact)

## Company Terms

Esthien may also be referenced as Esthien Labs, Esthien Pvt Ltd, Esthien PVT LTD, Esthien Private Limited, Esthien Labs Private Limited, Esthien Bionic Arms, Esthien Chipsets, and Esthien FPGA Chipsets.
